visual_overflow_findings.note: Broader representative scan was attempted twice but timed out; core deployed H1 checks completed here and post-deploy smoke is used as additional evidence.

claim_boundary_findings.forbidden_claim_policy: No precise career recommendation, hiring fit, salary/career success prediction, diagnosis/treatment/cure language may be introduced.

geo_jsonld_faq_findings.faq_grounding_gate: EN-PARITY-07 backend authority gate exists; frontend/runtime grounding still requires ongoing contract coverage.

frontend_fallback_risks.evidence: components/result/mbti/clone/content/index.ts states runtime desktop clone content owner moved to fap-api; RESULT-EN-PARITY-05 deauthorizes frontend clone interpretation copy.
llms topic fallback governance tests exist; fallback must not be treated as CMS authority.

authority_drift_risks.risk: sitemap still exposes 404 content/help/policy and career job URLs despite backend authority gates
EN content/page/article/career/media drafts must not be counted as published production content until controlled import/review completes

internal_link_readiness.gap: Do not add links until sitemap/URL Truth P0 exposure is clean; career job/detail missing counterparts and 404s make some edges invalid.

p0_findings.summary: sitemap exposes content/help/policy URLs that return hard 404
p0_findings.evidence: Bounded runtime HTTP checks returned 404 Page Not Found; /tmp/global-check-sitemap.xml contains these paths; llms surfaces contain /en/support and /zh/support.
p0_findings.recommended_fix: Remove missing-authority 404 URLs from sitemap/llms or restore authority-backed routes; do not use frontend fallback as authority.

p0_findings.summary: sitemap exposes career job detail URLs while sampled runtime detail pages return hard 404 after slow responses
p0_findings.recommended_owner: Career URL Truth / sitemap source owners
p0_findings.recommended_fix: Gate career job detail sitemap exposure on real 200 canonical authority, or restore route/API authority for the exposed job detail URLs.

p1_findings.summary: bounded runtime scanner hit AbortError/timeout on sitemap-included URLs, mainly career jobs and some content/topic/article pages
p1_findings.note: Longer curl sampling showed career job details return 404 slowly; remaining status0 rows require follow-up after P0 URL-surface cleanup.

p1_findings.summary: EN-PARITY-03 landed content_page import package only; missing EN foundational pages remain human-review/import work
EN-PARITY-04 prepared target article counterparts but still records deferred long-form English article work and runtime pair gaps
EN-PARITY-05 repo baseline has guide_code parity, but production exposure/runtime counterpart observation remains incomplete

deferred_items.reason: Runtime observation gaps require controlled backend/CMS import and URL-surface verification outside this no-production-mutation PR.
Career guide URLs must only enter public SEO surfaces after backend/CMS authority is published and indexable.

p1_findings.summary: EN-PARITY-06 media metadata/alt inventory landed, but shared cover visual/OCR and career guide OG images remain sidecar work
RESULT-EN-PARITY artifacts enforce fail-closed behavior but some result/report English assets remain deferred or draft-review only
Playwright core H1 overflow pass succeeded for EN homepage and ZH MBTI, but RIASEC pages timed out under 5s browser navigation; curl returned 200 in about 15s

p2_findings.summary: Broader representative Playwright pass timed out twice and was reduced to core H1 checks; nav/footer/card overflow on long-tail pages needs a later dedicated pass.
Staging containment is active, but any stale Baidu result remains a search-engine-side sidecar; no removal/submission action was performed.
fap-web still contains MBTI clone zh migration content, explicitly classified by RESULT-EN-PARITY-05 as non-authoritative; continue ensuring it cannot satisfy EN authority.
